subtitle: Every word spoken at FIRE CAMP is a weapon. These are the ones that changed everything.

messages.title: The Fire Is Real.
messages.speaker: FIRE CAMP Ministry Team
messages.description: The opening night message that set the tone for everything.

messages.title: Come As You Are.
messages.speaker: FIRE CAMP Ministry Team
messages.description: Day 2 morning session. This is where the room broke open.

messages.title: Set Apart. Sent Out.
messages.speaker: FIRE CAMP Ministry Team
messages.description: The commissioning message. The one that changed destinies.

messages.title: The Closing Fire.
messages.speaker: FIRE CAMP Ministry Team
messages.description: Final night. You had to be there. Now you can watch.
